## Change Surface

- Root package:
- Nested module:
- Docs/scripts/release boundary:

## API and Dependency Impact

- Public API changed: yes/no
- Root module dependency graph changed: yes/no
- Optional, demo-only, or benchmark-only dependency changed: yes/no
- English and Chinese docs updated: yes/no

## Validation

Commands run:

```sh

```

For root-module changes, include `./scripts/check-root.sh --quick`.
For nested-module changes, include `./scripts/check-split-modules.sh --quick --module <path>`.
Before a release, include `./scripts/check-release.sh`.
